  • Method Details

    • accreditedInvestor

      public LegalEntity.Builder accreditedInvestor(boolean accreditedInvestor)
      Indicates whether the entity is an accredited investor. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • exemptCustomerReason

      public LegalEntity.Builder exemptCustomerReason(LegalEntityExemptCustomerReason exemptCustomerReason)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Exempt entities must set `exempt_verifying_beneficial_owners` to `true` and provide an `exempt_customer_reason` on the owner record.

      Required if `exempt_verifying_beneficial_owners` is `true`.

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • exemptCustomerReason

      public LegalEntity.Builder exemptCustomerReason(Optional<? extends LegalEntityExemptCustomerReason> exemptCustomerReason)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Exempt entities must set `exempt_verifying_beneficial_owners` to `true` and provide an `exempt_customer_reason` on the owner record.

      Required if `exempt_verifying_beneficial_owners` is `true`.

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • exemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners

      public LegalEntity.Builder exemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners(boolean exemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners)
      Indicates whether the entity is exempt from verifying beneficial owners and Enhanced Due Diligence. By default, this is set to `false`

      public LegalEntity.Builder exemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners(Optional<Boolean> exemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners)
      Indicates whether the entity is exempt from verifying beneficial owners and Enhanced Due Diligence. By default, this is set to `false`

    • legalAddress

      public LegalEntity.Builder legalAddress(LegalAddress legalAddress)
      The mailing address of the legal entity. Required fields within the `legal_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • legalAddress

      public LegalEntity.Builder legalAddress(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends LegalAddress> legalAddress)
      The mailing address of the legal entity. Required fields within the `legal_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • legalEntityId

      public LegalEntity.Builder legalEntityId(String legalEntityId)
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single juridical (non-natural) person (e.g., a corporation); Used to access the record after creation

    • name

      public LegalEntity.Builder name(String name)
      The name field Format: legalEntities/{legalEntity}

    • name

      public LegalEntity.Builder name(Optional<String> name)
      The name field Format: legalEntities/{legalEntity}

    • operatingRegions

      public LegalEntity.Builder operatingRegions(List<String> operatingRegions)
      The operational footprint of an entity. Operating regions encompass all countries and regions where a company has a significant business presence This includes locations with physical offices, manufacturing plants, service centers, and sales and marketing activities Regions must be provided as two-character CLDR country codes

    • operatingRegions

      public LegalEntity.Builder operatingRegions(Optional<? extends List<String>> operatingRegions)
      The operational footprint of an entity. Operating regions encompass all countries and regions where a company has a significant business presence This includes locations with physical offices, manufacturing plants, service centers, and sales and marketing activities Regions must be provided as two-character CLDR country codes

    • registrationRegion

      public LegalEntity.Builder registrationRegion(String registrationRegion)
      The legal home of an entity. A region of registration, in the context of a corporation, refers to the specific geographic area where the corporation is legally registered and incorporated Defines the legal jurisdiction and framework under which the corporation operates, including legal regulations, tax obligations, and compliance requirements Region must be provided as a two-character CLDR country code

    • registrationRegion

      public LegalEntity.Builder registrationRegion(Optional<String> registrationRegion)
      The legal home of an entity. A region of registration, in the context of a corporation, refers to the specific geographic area where the corporation is legally registered and incorporated Defines the legal jurisdiction and framework under which the corporation operates, including legal regulations, tax obligations, and compliance requirements Region must be provided as a two-character CLDR country code

    • regulatedInvestmentCompany

      public LegalEntity.Builder regulatedInvestmentCompany(boolean regulatedInvestmentCompany)
      Indicates whether the entity is a regulated investment company. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • regulatedInvestmentCompany

      public LegalEntity.Builder regulatedInvestmentCompany(Optional<Boolean> regulatedInvestmentCompany)
      Indicates whether the entity is a regulated investment company. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • relatedDocumentIds

      public LegalEntity.Builder relatedDocumentIds(List<String> relatedDocumentIds)
      Document ids related to the legal entity. At least one is required for RIA correspondents when creating Estate or Trust accounts.

    • relatedDocumentIds

      public LegalEntity.Builder relatedDocumentIds(Optional<? extends List<String>> relatedDocumentIds)
      Document ids related to the legal entity. At least one is required for RIA correspondents when creating Estate or Trust accounts.

      public LegalEntity.Builder revocableTrust(boolean revocableTrust)
      Indicates whether the trust is a revocable trust. By default, this is set to `false`.

      Indicates whether the trust is a revocable trust. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • taxId

      public LegalEntity.Builder taxId(String taxId)
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related entity; Must be provided with `EIN` tax ID type

    • taxId

      public LegalEntity.Builder taxId(Optional<String> taxId)
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related entity; Must be provided with `EIN` tax ID type

    • taxIdLastFour

      public LegalEntity.Builder taxIdLastFour(String taxIdLastFour)
      The last four characters of the related person's tax identifier; Masked/truncated to "last four" in most usage contexts to preserve data privacy.

    • taxIdLastFour

      public LegalEntity.Builder taxIdLastFour(Optional<String> taxIdLastFour)
      The last four characters of the related person's tax identifier; Masked/truncated to "last four" in most usage contexts to preserve data privacy.

    • taxIdType

      public LegalEntity.Builder taxIdType(LegalEntityTaxIdType taxIdType)
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.

    • taxIdType

      public LegalEntity.Builder taxIdType(Optional<? extends LegalEntityTaxIdType> taxIdType)
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.
